# showcontrol_releases
Releases for showcontrol ecosystem

If launching the app gives you a "File is damaged" warning, copy these lines in a CLI to launch it

```bash
xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine "/Applications/Show Control.app"  
open "/Applications/Show Control.app"
```
